description: Apache Kafka's Java client library provides APIs for producing records to Kafka, consuming records from Kafka, and administering Kafka clusters. It lets Java applications interact with Kafka brokers through the producer, consumer, and AdminClient APIs.

Apache Kafka clients provides the Java producer, consumer, and admin client APIs used to connect applications to Apache Kafka clusters. It handles client-side networking, serialization integration, metadata, partitioning, offset management, and protocol interactions with Kafka brokers.
